mapper.update: UPDATE NMCP_RENEW_RESERVE SET PROC_YN = 'P' , AMD_ID = 'BATCH' , AMD_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE RENEW_SEQ = #{renewSeq}
UPDATE NMCP_RENEW_RESERVE SET PROC_YN = 'Y' , AMD_ID = 'BATCH' , AMD_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE RENEW_SEQ = #{renewSeq}
UPDATE NMCP_RENEW_RESERVE SET PROC_YN = 'E' , AMD_ID = 'BATCH' , AMD_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE RENEW_SEQ = #{renewSeq}
